shell.description: App shell that wraps all templates

templates.name: Dashboard
templates.description: Analytics and metrics overview with configurable widget grid for KPIs, charts, and data tables

slots.name: date-range-picker
slots.description: Filter all widgets by date range

sections.description: Page title, date range filter, and dashboard controls

components.description: Key performance indicators with trend visualization

sections.description: Row of 4 KPI cards showing main metrics

components.description: Configurable widget cards containing charts or tables

sections.description: Grid of configurable dashboard widgets with multiple chart types

widgetTypes.name: metric-card
widgetTypes.description: Single KPI with trend arrow and comparison

widgetTypes.name: line-chart
widgetTypes.description: Time-series line chart with legend and tooltip

widgetTypes.name: bar-chart
widgetTypes.description: Vertical or horizontal bar chart for comparisons

widgetTypes.name: pie-chart
widgetTypes.description: Pie or donut chart for distribution breakdown

widgetTypes.name: data-table
widgetTypes.description: Compact data grid within card with sort/filter

widgetTypes.name: activity-feed
widgetTypes.description: Recent events or transaction list with timestamps

interactionRules.action: update all widgets with new data range
navigate to detail view or drill-down dashboard
open widget in full-screen modal or new tab
open configuration dialog for widget type and data source
remove widget from dashboard with undo option
reorder widget in grid with visual feedback
interactionRules.feedback: shadow-lg on dragged element, dashed border at drop target

interactionRules.action: resize widget to new grid span
reload all widgets with loading skeletons

dataLoadingBehavior.initialLoad: show loading skeleton for all widgets with staggered 100ms delay
dataLoadingBehavior.errorState: per-widget error boundary with retry button, not full-page error
dataLoadingBehavior.staleData: show 'Last updated 5 minutes ago' timestamp if data older than 5 minutes
dataLoadingBehavior.refresh: all widgets update with new loading skeleton, staggered animation

templates.name: Conversation Inbox
templates.description: Split-view inbox with conversation list and detail panel for messaging, support, and customer conversations

sections.description: Search bar and filter tabs for conversation list

components.description: Scrollable list of conversations with preview and status

sections.description: Scrollable list of conversations with avatars, previews, and timestamps
Contact header with name, status, and action buttons

slots.name: message-list
slots.content: AI Chat messages from both parties

components.description: AI Chat component showing conversation history

sections.description: Chat message history and real-time conversation
Message input area with formatting options and send button

sections.visibility: toggleable (hidden on mobile, collapsed on tablet)
sections.description: Collapsible sidebar with contact info, history, tags, and CRM integration

interactionRules.action: load conversation in detail panel and mark as read
filter conversation list in real-time
update conversation list to show filtered subset
append message to chat, update list preview, scroll to bottom
open assign dialog to select team member
show/hide customer context panel
add to starred tab, show visual feedback
move conversation to top of list with highlight flash, update preview text
show typing indicator in chat area

mobile.layout: full-width list OR full-width detail with back navigation
mobile.tabs: bottom-navigation for quick access to All/Unread/Assigned
mobile.detailNavigation: back button to return to list

realtimeBehavior.newMessages: conversation moves to top of list with 200ms yellow highlight flash, unread badge increments
realtimeBehavior.typingIndicators: show 'Contact is typing...' bubble with animation in chat area
realtimeBehavior.presenceDots: online/offline/away status indicator on conversation avatar in list
realtimeBehavior.soundNotifications: optional notification sound for new messages (user preference configurable)
realtimeBehavior.readReceipts: show 'seen at HH:MM' timestamp after message, updated when recipient reads

load available fields and metrics for that source
update preview visualization in real-time
append filter condition to builder, update preview
save report to workspace and show confirmation
download report in selected format

notificationBehavior.deadline: highlight overdue items in red, show warning 24 hours before deadline
notificationBehavior.rejectReason: show reject reason in comments section with highlighted background
